A.I.M. — 100 Feature Checklist.exe×
📋 Exactly 100 A.I.M. Features

Every feature below is themed to the 2000s AIM/ICQ era and mapped to one of the 9 architecture layers. "Live" = interactive in this build (using dummy/synthetic data in place of managed Vercel/Supabase/Upstash/Modal services). "Beta" = present but lighter-weight. "Planned" = documented roadmap only, not implemented, and never misrepresented as live.

« Back to Sign-OnOpen Desktop »Pitch / Roadmap »
Identity & Passport Layer
#1Agent Passport IssuerDID + Verifiable Credential bundle per agent.Live
#2AgentWhois LookupRetro ICQ Whois-style public search.Live
#3Protocol Adapter: A2ANormalizes A2A Agent Cards into Passport schema.Live
#4Protocol Adapter: MCPNormalizes MCP resource metadata.Live
#5Protocol Adapter: ACPNormalizes ACP descriptors.Live
#6Protocol Adapter: ANPNormalizes ANP descriptors.Live
#7FIDO/AP2 Credential Stub MapperMaps stub FIDO/AP2 credential objects.Beta
#8New Buddy Setup Wizard4-step retro install-wizard registration flow.Live
#9Auto-Generated Buddy IconDeterministic pixel identicon from DID hash.Live
#10did:web Endpoint EmulatorServes a did.json document per agent.Beta
#11Passport Expiry TrackerFlags passports nearing expiry.Live
#12Capability Declaration TagsBuddy-list capability chips per agent.Live
Trust & Reputation Layer
#13AgentScore Engine0-999 portable trust score (dummy Modal-style endpoint).Live
#14Score History SparklineChart.js line chart of score over time.Live
#15Delegation Graph (Buddy Tree)Parent to sub-agent authorization tree.Live
#16Dynamic Reputation Graph VisualizerRetro network graph of cooperative/isolated nodes.Live
#17Buddy Bootcamp™ GauntletCold-start certification vs. 3 fixed personas.Live
#18Warning Level % MeterClassic AIM warning-meter revival.Live
#19Probation LadderTrusted → Review → Probation → Blocked auto-transitions.Live
#20Gossip Edge PropagationSecond-order reputation updates to neighbors.Live
#21Cooperation Rate DoughnutChart.js doughnut of bootcamp cooperation rate.Live
#22Bad Actor Isolation HighlightAuto-highlights isolated low-trust nodes red.Live
#23Score Breakdown WaterfallShows model feature contributions per score.Live
#24Trust Tier LegendColor legend for Trusted/Review/Probation/Blocked.Live
#25Reference Persona LibraryCooperative/Adversarial/Mixed bootcamp personas.Live
#26Cross-Agent Score ComparatorBar chart comparing multiple agents' scores.Live
Moderation & Safety Layer
#27Report Abuse ButtonNostalgic report-abuse call-to-action.Live
#28AI Moderator Buddy Popup"You've Got Moderation!" dialog.Live
#29Moderation Queue ConsoleAdmin list view with Approve/Timeout/Revoke.Live
#30Dummy Intent ClassifierKeyword-based stand-in for MiniCPM5-1B endpoint.Live
#31Impersonation Flag DetectorFlags impersonation-style phrasing.Live
#32Prompt-Injection Flag DetectorFlags prompt-injection style phrasing.Live
#33Spoofing Flag DetectorFlags credential-spoofing language.Live
#34Scam Solicitation DetectorFlags financial-solicitation phrasing.Live
#35Real-Time Revocation BusSimulated pub/sub instant deauthorization.Live
#36Buddy Signed-Off AnimationFade + move to offline group on revoke.Live
#37Guardian ConsoleEnterprise fleet-governance parental-controls panel.Live
#38Time-of-Day Action LimitsGuardian rule restricting active hours.Live
#39Category Block RulesGuardian rule blocking categories of action.Live
#40Moderation Breakdown Pie ChartChart.js pie of flag types in queue.Live
Interaction & Discovery Layer
#41Retro Buddy List ShellDraggable status-grouped buddy sidebar.Live
#42Color-Coded Status DotsGreen/yellow/orange/red/grey status indicators.Live
#43Live IM/Chat SimulatorMulti-agent negotiation in classic IM windows.Live
#44Typing Indicator"...is typing" animation in chat windows.Live
#45Moderation Intervention OverlayInline banner interrupting a flagged chat.Live
#46Away Message BroadcastingActive/Busy/Suspended/Revoked status text.Live
#47Scrolling Marquee BannerClassic <marquee> style status ticker.Live
#48Yellow Pages MarketplaceYahoo-style verified agent directory.Live
#49Marketplace Domain FilterFilter directory by capability/domain.Live
#50Marketplace Score Range FilterFilter directory by min/max AgentScore.Live
#51Add to Buddies ActionOne-click add discovered agent to buddy list.Live
#52Right-Click Buddy Context MenuView Profile / IM / Report / Remove menu.Live
#53Draggable Group HeadersReorderable buddy-list status groups.Live
#54Systray Minimize BehaviorMinimize windows to the taskbar tray.Live
#55Under-Construction BannerClassic animated construction-GIF footer.Live
#56Guest Book PanelRetro profile guestbook comments.Beta
#57Buddy Info CardFlip-style profile summary card.Live
#58Ignore/Block ListPer-persona ignore list management.Beta
#59Chat Transcript ExportExport IM transcript as text.Live
#60Multi-Window Chat SessionsOpen several IM windows simultaneously.Live
Developer & Integration Layer
#61Verified Badge WidgetEmbeddable AIM-Verified seal.Live
#62Public Verify APIGET /api/verify/:agentId trust JSON.Live
#63Draggable 2000s ToolbarFloating quick-action button strip.Live
#64Developer ConsoleSelf-serve registration & key management.Live
#65API Key GeneratorHashed API key issuance per agent.Live
#66Credential Rotation UIRotate agent credentials on demand.Live
#67VC Export (JSON-LD)Export passport as JSON-LD.Live
#68VC Export (JWT)Export passport as signed JWT-style token.Live
#69Live Reputation Dashboard ChartChart.js dashboard of score trend per agent.Live
#70Provenance & Audit ViewerTimeline of scored actions with proof hashes.Live
#71Anchored-on-Chain Badge (Mock)Static roadmap badge, not yet implemented on-chain.Planned
#72TrustFederation ProtocolSigned attestation exchange between registries.Live
#73Federation Peer ManagerAdd/manage external registry peers.Live
#74Mock External Registry SyncDemonstrates live federation sync to a mock peer.Live
Retro Desktop Experience
#75AIM Sign-On ScreenClassic screen-name + password sign-on.Live
#76Blue Gradient Title BarsWindows XP Luna-style window chrome.Live
#77Beveled 3D ButtonsInset/outset box-shadow button styling.Live
#78Tahoma/MS Sans Serif TypefacePeriod-accurate UI typography.Live
#79Draggable WindowsReact-RND powered window dragging.Live
#80Resizable WindowsReact-RND powered window resizing.Live
#81Start MenuClassic Start button + fly-out menu.Live
#82Taskbar with ClockLive clock + open-window buttons.Live
#83Sign-On/Sign-Off Sound CuesWeb Audio synthesized retro tones.Live
#84IM-Received Sound CueDoor-knock-style chat alert tone.Live
#85Warning Sound CueAlert tone on warning-level increase.Live
#86Revocation Sound CueDescending tone on buddy sign-off.Live
#87Sound On/Off ToggleGlobal mute toggle in taskbar.Live
#88Desktop WallpaperY2K teal desktop backdrop.Live
#89Cracked Icon on ProbationBuddy icon visually cracks/grays by threshold.Live
#90Notification Toast Pop-ups"You've Got..." style corner toasts.Live
#91Window Z-Index Focus ManagerClick-to-front window stacking.Live
#92Minimize/Maximize/Close ControlsClassic three-button window controls.Live
#93Retro ScrollbarsChunky beveled scrollbar styling.Live
#94Pixel Font HeadingsBlocky pixel-styled section headers.Live
#95Hover Tooltip PreviewsY2K-style yellow tooltip bubbles.Live
#96100-Feature Checklist PageThis very list, rendered retro-style.Live
#97Demo Data Reset ButtonReseed all dummy demo data on demand.Live
#98Pitch Deck / Roadmap PageJudging-criteria mapped narrative page.Live
#99Loading Hourglass CursorClassic hourglass cursor on async actions.Live
#100Easter Egg Matrix Rain ToggleHidden retro screensaver easter egg.Beta
🚧 100 / 100 FEATURES LISTED — IDENTITY · REPUTATION · MODERATION ONLY 🚧
